feat: implement pencil design system sync with warm neutral palette

Replace Gen Z color palette with Pencil warm neutral colors, migrate typography from Inter to Outfit font family, and restyled core UI components \(buttons: 48px height with pill radius and shadow; text inputs: 12px radius with 1.5px borders\). Updated all broken color references in theme configuration and documentation.

Changes:
- app_colors.dart: New warm neutral palette \(cream, taupe, warm grey, accent peach\)
- app_text_styles.dart: Outfit font family with adjusted sizing
- app_button.dart: 48px height, pill radius, shadow elevation, new variants
- app_text_field.dart: 12px border radius, 1.5px borders, error state fill
- flowering-app-widget-with-getx.dart: Fixed theme color references
- Updated docs for architecture, code standards, and changelog

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
